title: Engineering Mathematics - Linear Algebra - Eigen Vector

questions.question:
Consider three vectors \( x=\begin{bmatrix}1\\2 \end{bmatrix}, y=\begin{bmatrix}4\\8 \end{bmatrix},z=\begin{bmatrix}3\\1 \end{bmatrix} \). Which of the folowing statements is true



Linear Algebra: NIELIT 2016 MAR Scientist C
options: \( x \) and \( y \) are linearly independent
\( x \) and \( y \) are linearly dependent
\( x \) and \( z \) are linearly dependent
questions.correct_answer: \( x \) and \( y \) are linearly dependent
